title: iSwim Samui
shortDesc: Private mobile swimming lessons at your villa or hotel pool — from babies 6 months old through to school-age children.
description: iSwim Samui provides private, mobile swimming lessons with an AUSTSWIM-qualified instructor who comes directly to your villa or hotel pool. Programs cover baby and toddler aquatics from 6 months, pre-school swimming (ages 2–3) and learn-to-swim from age 4. Maximum 2 children per session. The instructor is an Autism Swim approved provider and ADHD-sensitive, making this a great option for children with additional needs.

location.address: Mobile service — NE Koh Samui (Bangrak, Bophut, Chaweng, Choeng Mon, Maenam)
